title: A Daughter of Luxury
writer: Beulah Marie Dix, Leonard Merrick (play), Michael Morton (play)
actors: Agnes Ayres, Tom Gallery, Edith Yorke, Howard Ralston
plot: Wealthy Mary Fenton is the subject of a lawsuit, and she is temporarily denied access to her money. Circumstances result in her being forces to pose as Mary Cosgrove, an heiress living in ...
